content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +0.38%, Bank Nifty +0.96%, Auto +1.75%, Pharma +1.23% leading. VIX cooling to 17.36 (-3%). Global cues supportive with US markets strong overnight. Multiple sectors participating suggests genuine breadth, not narrow leadership.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.66,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD effectively — current SL 1040.66 is already at +5.7% above entry (good lock-in). CMP 1058 is 1.6% above SL — within healthy trail-gap. No change warranted; thesis intact, Q4 print strong, momentum continues. Keeping levels. Note: emitting as HOLD via position_actions to avoid no-op MODIFY."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive anchor at -1.0%. SL 119 is well-placed below recent support. Gold cooling but 52w range mid-zone. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock made ATH 1751 today, currently 1732. SL 1715 already at entry+0.9% (locked in). Trail-gap to CMP is 1.0% — at the floor, but holding it tight given ATH-fade pattern (high 1751→1732). Keeping SL at 1715, target 1800 unchanged. Same-values MODIFY skipped — emitting HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Banking sector +0.96%, position flat at -0.3%. SL 206 sits 1.1% below CMP — within trail-gap. Q4 turnaround thesis intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.7%, defence rallied broadly. SL at entry (breakeven) — but P&L only at +1.7%, below the +2% threshold for breakeven trail mandate. However, May 14 board meeting (Q4 results) is binary catalyst within 6 sessions — not yet within 3-session rule but approaching. Will reassess closer to event. Holding values; emitting HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -3.0%, near SL 1420 (CMP 1440). Q4 was strong (+124% PAT) but stock faded post-result. SL 1420 is a clear line — let it work. If it triggers, exit cleanly. Bengaluru concentration overhang weighing despite fundamentals."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6950.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.1% gain, SL 6950 is at entry+0.7% (locked in breakeven+). CMP 7052 — trail gap 1.5%, healthy. No-op MODIFY values; emitting HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at -0.2%. Q4 board meeting expected mid-late May — binary risk approaching but not within 3 sessions. SL 820 sits 2% below CMP — adequate. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.5%, NBFC theme intact post Q4 (+30% PAT). SL 358 sits 2.5% below CMP. Hold to target 388."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "CHOLAHLDNG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 25,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BINARY EVENT DISCIPLINE: FY26 audited results + earnings call scheduled May 8 (just 2 trading sessions away). Holdco discount + unannounced Q4 = binary tail risk. Position -0.4% currently, ~4.3% of capital. Per rule 11 (binary events <3 sessions), default disposition is exit/trim. Exiting cleanly rather than holding through. Following the TORNTPOWER/ADANIPOWER playbook that worked."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong (+18% PAT, +22% rev), final divi Rs 4. FMCG sector leading. Position flat at -0.1%. SL 800 sits 2.3% below CMP. Hold to target 855."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3245.00,
      "new_target": 3430.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "M&M +6.3% on day, position +0.5%. Auto sector leading +1.75%. Tightening SL from 3210 to 3245 (~1.7% below CMP 3301.70 — meets 1% trail-gap floor) to reduce risk on a strong-momentum name where the upside thesis is intact (record FY26 PAT, 48.5% Q4 jump). New SL is 1.4% below CMP (just above floor, but acceptable given strong intraday close near highs). New risk: 56pt vs 128pt reward = R:R 1:2.3. Holding target 3430."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BIOCON",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BINARY EVENT BLOCK: Q4 board meeting tomorrow May 7 + earnings call May 8. Last quarter missed by 18.76%. Per rule 11, no new entry within 3 sessions of binary catalyst unless event-trade with conf >=0.70 — current setup doesn't justify event-trade premium. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 30,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 1259.00,
      "stop_loss": 1215.00,
      "target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 print exceptional: PAT +144% QoQ, EBIT margin +370bps to 14.4%, FY27 guide 20.5% EBITDA with $1.75B order book. Stock +9.3% intraday, holding gains above VWAP 1273... actually CMP 1259 below VWAP 1273 — entering on intraday consolidation as planned. IT sector beaten down (-25% YTD), Coforge clear outlier. Risk 44 (3.5%) vs reward 71 (5.6%) = R:R 1:1.6. Position size ~3.7% of capital. Max hold 10 days. Cigniti merger record date May 16 is positive optionality not a binary risk.",
      "max_hold_days": 10
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "AUROPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results scheduled May 30 — outside 3-session binary window, but stock at 95% of 52w high leaves limited cushion. Already have BANDHANBNK + ABCAPITAL + PNBHOUSING + CHOLAHLDNG (exiting) in financials cluster. Pharma exposure preferred via cleaner setup. Skip for now."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1040.66 already trailed to +5.7% above entry. CMP 1058. Trail-gap 1.6% — adequate. No change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive anchor. SL 119 below structural support."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1715 already at entry+0.9%. CMP 1732. Trail-gap 1.0% — at floor. No tightening — would risk self-stopout. ATH 1751 made today; let it run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Banking strength, Q4 turnaround intact, P&L flat."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven 4575 already. P&L +1.7%, below +2% trail trigger. May 14 board meeting binary risk — will tighten/exit closer to event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Near SL 1420 — let the predefined risk line work. No emotional adjustment."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 6950 = entry+0.7%, breakeven+ locked. Trail-gap 1.5% to CMP 7052. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 result ~mid-late May — outside 3-session window. SL 820 adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 done, NBFC theme intact, SL 358 placed below recent support."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CHOLAHLDNG",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Binary event May 8 (2 sessions). Exit per rule 11."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 cleared, FMCG defensive bid, SL adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 3245.00,
      "reasoning": "Auto sector +1.75% leadership, M&M +6.3% on record FY26 print. Tightening SL 3210→3245 to reduce open risk while letting upside run."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BIOCON: revisit post May 7 results if Q4 clean and stock holds 360+. AUROPHARMA: revisit if pulls back to 1420 zone with sector still strong. TITAGARH (held): Q4 print mid-late May — will need to decide on event-trim closer to date. HAL: May 14 board meeting — will trim or tighten SL on Day 18-19. CAMS, GRSE, HFCL pending order — current HFCL BUY at 133.50 is still working from earlier; let it ride.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-diversified across Financials (PNBHOUSING, BANDHANBNK, ABCAPITAL — CHOLAHLDNG exiting), Auto (M&M), Defence (HAL), Pharma/Chemicals (NAVINFLUOR), Realty (SOBHA), FMCG (MARICO), Capital Goods (TITAGARH), Logistics (ADANIPORTS), Gold (GOLDBEES). Deployed 66%, healthy cushion. After CHOLAHLDNG exit (~₹43k freed) and COFORGE add (~₹38k), net deployed roughly unchanged. Multiple positions approaching binary events — disciplined exits planned. Net P&L +0.45% intraday; maintain capital preservation discipline."
}
